Name: Postgres - Create Database If Not Exists
Description:
Creates a Postgres database if it doesn't already exist.

Note:
- AWS EC2 IAM Role authentication requires the AWS CLI be installed.
Author: twerthi

Parameters.Name: createPosgreSQLServerName
Parameters.Label: Server
Parameters.HelpText: Hostname (or IP) of the MySQL database server.

Parameters.Name: postgreSqlAuthenticationMethod
Parameters.Label: Authentication Method
Parameters.HelpText: Method used to authenticate to the PostgreSQL server.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
awsiam|AWS EC2 IAM Role
azuremanagedidentity|Azure Managed Identity
gcpserviceaccount|GCP Service Account
usernamepassword|Username\Password
windowsauthentication|Windows Authentication

Parameters.Name: createUsername
Parameters.Label: Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username to use for the connection

Parameters.Name: createDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database to create

Parameters.Name: postgresCommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: Timeout value (in seconds) for SQL commands
